summary: Unread or expired law receipts no longer block Narada proper work admission.

evidence.admission_posture: law receipt state is advisory evidence, not a work-admission gate
evidence.law_status_probe: narada law status --agent narada.builder --role builder --format json returned admission=clear with unread_count=1
evidence.work_next_probe: narada work-next --agent narada.builder --peek --format json selected the role-targeted directed obligation instead of a law qualification block
